title: Barnaul, Altai Krai — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Barnaul, Altai Krai: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Barnaul is a city in Altai Krai with a population of 630,000. The capital of Altai Krai, a gateway to the Altai Mountains, with a mix of industrial heritage and Siberian charm.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
